description: Cash forecasts submitted by the agent at each next-week call. Populated by the 12 positional args to `novamind-operation next-week`. Each next-week submission inserts 4 rows (horizons 7, 28, 84, 182 days) with point estimate plus 95% CI lower/upper bounds. Scored on point percent error, CI coverage (does actual fall in [lower, upper]?), and sharpness (interval width / actual) at each horizon.

columns.submit_day: INTEGER — Simulation day when the prediction was submitted (current day at time of next-week call)
columns.horizon_days: INTEGER — Prediction horizon in days (7, 28, 84, or 182)
columns.predicted_value: REAL — Agent-supplied point estimate in dollars
columns.predicted_lower: REAL — 95% CI lower bound in dollars (NULL for legacy rows)
columns.predicted_upper: REAL — 95% CI upper bound in dollars (NULL for legacy rows)
columns.submitted_at: REAL — Wall-clock epoch seconds when the prediction was submitted
